seo.title: Educational Materials for English Teachers | Kamila Łobko-Koziej
seo.description: Creative teaching materials, lesson plans, year-long projects, and ready-made packs for English language teachers.
seo.ai_summary: Online store with educational materials for English teachers. Offers lesson plans, printable PDF worksheets, themed packs, and year-long projects. Created by Kamila Łobko-Koziej with 15+ years of experience.

hero.title: Teach English with Passion and Ease
hero.subtitle: Creative teaching materials that will transform your lessons. Save time on preparation and inspire your students every day.

footer.description: Original, creative teaching materials for English teachers. Get inspired!

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Got a question about materials? Need support in choosing a package? Write to us or talk to our AI assistant. We are here for you!
contact.emailDesc: Our inbox is open 24/7 for you.
contact.phoneDesc: Mon-Fri from 9:00 to 17:00 we are on the phone.
contact.aiHelpDesc: Our smart assistant knows the answers to most common questions. Ask about products, teaching methods, or material availability.
contact.aiHelpMobile: AI Assistant is available in the bottom corner of the screen.

form.name: Name & Surname
form.subject: Subject
form.successDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We will respond as soon as possible.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.welcome: Hi! I am your smart assistant. Before we start, are you already our customer?

responses.clientYes: Great! How can I help you today?
responses.clientNo: I see. I'd love to help you explore our materials. What is your name and email so I can send you some free samples?
responses.dataSaved: Thank you! I've saved your details. Now feel free to ask anything.
responses.fallback: I'm sorry, I don't quite understand. Could you rephrase it? You can ask about pricing, delivery, or teaching methods.

knowledge.price: Our PDF materials start at $29. Annual packages (Mega Pack) are currently on sale for $149.
knowledge.delivery: All materials are digital. You will receive a download link immediately after payment.
knowledge.preschool: We have a great 'English in Preschool' section. I especially recommend our 4 Seasons pack.
knowledge.contact: You can email us or call +1 234 567 890 (Mon-Fri 9:00-17:00).
knowledge.invoice: Yes, we issue VAT invoices. You can provide invoice details in the cart.
knowledge.methods: Kamila Łobko-Koziej promotes a play-based approach (TPR, communicative games). Check our blog to learn more!
